text: A healthy lifestyle involves more than just eating well. A balanced diet with fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body energy. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, strengthens your heart and muscles. However, physical health is not enough. Getting enough sleep—about seven to nine hours each night—helps your brain rest and repair. Mental health is equally important. Taking time to relax, talk to friends, or practice mindfulness can reduce stress. Finally, a good work-life balance is essential. Make sure you set aside time for hobbies and family, so you don't feel overwhelmed. Small, consistent changes can lead to a happier, healthier life.
